author: DominicVainMod
content:
Star Atlas Double XP Weekend - Kicks Off Soon! (Iris' Blessing),Double XP weekend kicks off in just 3 hours! You’ll earn double XP, double Ink and double zXP on z.ink. Oh my!   

Hop in Star Atlas on the Epic Games Store and play in official shooter or racing matches to participate!

Countdown  

@everyone
